mission.title: backstage: Entity Relation Processing
mission.description:
Fixes #2960 

Partial implementation of entity relationships. It takes it to the point where relationships are part of the processing output, but doesn't actually attach them to entities or store them in any way. Figuring we can keep discussions around the issue on this PR.

What I can see we can either refactor to get a global view of all entities so that the relationships can be attached at the end of the processing, or we can add a new table that keeps track of entity fragments that should be attached to entities when reading from the catalog, along with the logic for stitching them together.

Also need to consider the `entities_search` table and how to construct it, and whether it should contain relations.

resolution.summary:
## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!

Fixes #2958 

This adds the initial implementation of entity relations storage. It does not implement querying and needs a few more tests before it's ready for review.

Once this is in we can continue #2617 to get the it set up e2e

#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist

- [ ] A changeset describing the change and affected packages. ([more info](https://github.com/spotify/backstage/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#creating-changesets))
- [ ] Added or updated documentation
- [ ] Tests for new functionality and regression tests for bug fixes
- [ ] Screenshots attached (for UI changes)
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
